subject: dautoalign4warp
body:
Dear all,

I wanted to test the dautoalign4warp script to align tilt series processed 
in warp in dynamo. Right at the first TS I receive the following error:

Warning: All string and cell array inputs must be the same size or scalars.

My input looks like this:

dautoalign4warp("scripts/dynamo/imod/", 1.984, 2, 95.4, 
"scripts/dynamo/dRecon")
for the requested format of the function "dautoalign4warp(warp_imod_dir, 
apix, fiducial_diameter_nm, nominal_rotation_angle, output_folder)"

Does anyone knows how to solve this issue? Thank you and all the best,

Felix
